name: cycodeapigate
description: Query the Cycode Risk Intelligence Graph (RIG) for Open violations matching a repository and optionally fail the pipeline.
helpMarkDown: Authenticates to the Cycode platform API and queries the Risk Intelligence Graph for Open violations. Supports filtering by severity, category, and risk score. No agent-side tooling required.
author: Cycode

inputs.name: CycodeClientID
inputs.label: Cycode Client ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cycode API Client ID. Store this in a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: CycodeClientSecret
inputs.label: Cycode Client Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cycode API Client Secret. Store this in a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: repoName
inputs.label: Repository Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Bare repository name as stored in Cycode's RIG (e.g. `my-service`). Check the Violations UI to confirm the exact name — it is NOT the full SCM path.

inputs.name: severityMin
inputs.label: Minimum Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Only count violations at this severity or above. Leave blank to count all severities.

inputs.name: category
inputs.label: Category Filter
inputs.helpMarkDown: Restrict results to a specific scan category.

inputs.name: riskScoreMin
inputs.label: Minimum Risk Score (0–100)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Only count violations with a risk score at or above this value (0–100). Leave blank to ignore.

inputs.name: breakPipeline
inputs.label: Break Pipeline on Violations
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the pipeline task if any violations matching the filters are found.

inputs.name: apiUrl
inputs.label: Cycode API Base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Override the Cycode API base URL for self-hosted or regional deployments.
